originalTitle: Trump says rising economic costs will not force him into Iran deal
summary: President’s comments come as hopes of an agreement to end the war push oil prices lower
content: President’s comments come as hopes of an agreement to end the war push oil prices lower
chineseTitle: 特朗普表示经济成本上升不会迫使他签署伊朗协议
chineseSummary: 总统发表此番言论之际，对结束战争的协议的希望推动油价走低
chineseContent: 总统发表此番言论之际，对结束战争的协议的希望推动油价走低
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
